verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus David, filiorum Jonadab, et priorum captivorum.   In te, Domine, speravi ; non confundar in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּךָֽ־יְהֹוָ֥ה חָסִ֑יתִי אַל־אֵב֥וֹשָׁה לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: In thee, O Lord, do I put my trust: let me never be put to confusion.

verses.latin_vulgate: In justitia tua libera me, et eripe me :  inclina ad me aurem tuam, et salva me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּצִדְקָתְךָ֗ תַּצִּילֵ֥נִי וּֽתְפַלְּטֵ֑נִי הַטֵּֽה־אֵלַ֥י אׇ֝זְנְךָ֗ וְהוֹשִׁיעֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Deliver me in thy righteousness, and cause me to escape: incline thine ear unto me, and save me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Esto mihi in Deum protectorem,  et in locum munitum, ut salvum me facias :  quoniam firmamentum meum et refugium meum es tu.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֱיֵ֤ה לִ֨י ׀ לְצ֥וּר מָע֡וֹן לָב֗וֹא תָּמִ֗יד צִוִּ֥יתָ לְהוֹשִׁיעֵ֑נִי כִּֽי־סַלְעִ֖י וּמְצוּדָתִ֣י אָֽתָּה׃
verses.king_james: Be thou my strong habitation, whereunto I may continually resort: thou hast given commandment to save me; for thou art my rock and my fortress.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus meus, eripe me de manu peccatoris,  et de manu contra legem agentis, et iniqui :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱֽלֹהַ֗י פַּ֭לְּטֵנִי מִיַּ֣ד רָשָׁ֑ע מִכַּ֖ף מְעַוֵּ֣ל וְחוֹמֵֽץ׃
verses.king_james: Deliver me, O my God, out of the hand of the wicked, out of the hand of the unrighteous and cruel man.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam tu es patientia mea, Domine ;  Domine, spes mea a juventute mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֥ה תִקְוָתִ֑י אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱ֝הֹוִ֗ה מִבְטַחִ֥י מִנְּעוּרָֽי׃
verses.king_james: For thou art my hope, O Lord God: thou art my trust from my youth.

verses.latin_vulgate: In te confirmatus sum ex utero ;  de ventre matris meæ tu es protector meus ;  in te cantatio mea semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָלֶ֤יךָ ׀ נִסְמַ֬כְתִּי מִבֶּ֗טֶן מִמְּעֵ֣י אִ֭מִּי אַתָּ֣ה גוֹזִ֑י בְּךָ֖ תְהִלָּתִ֣י תָמִֽיד׃
verses.king_james: By thee have I been holden up from the womb: thou art he that took me out of my mother’s bowels: my praise shall be continually of thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tamquam prodigium factus sum multis ;  et tu adjutor fortis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּ֭מוֹפֵת הָיִ֣יתִי לְרַבִּ֑ים וְ֝אַתָּ֗ה מַֽחֲסִי־עֹֽז׃
verses.king_james: I am as a wonder unto many; but thou art my strong refuge.

verses.latin_vulgate: Repleatur os meum laude,  ut cantem gloriam tuam,  tota die magnitudinem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִמָּ֣לֵא פִ֭י תְּהִלָּתֶ֑ךָ כׇּל־הַ֝יּ֗וֹם תִּפְאַרְתֶּֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Let my mouth be filled with thy praise and with thy honour all the day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne projicias me in tempore senectutis ;  cum defecerit virtus mea, ne derelinquas me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַֽל־תַּ֭שְׁלִיכֵנִי לְעֵ֣ת זִקְנָ֑ה כִּכְל֥וֹת כֹּ֝חִ֗י אַֽל־תַּעַזְבֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Cast me not off in the time of old age; forsake me not when my strength faileth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia dixerunt inimici mei mihi,  et qui custodiebant animam meam consilium fecerunt in unum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אָמְר֣וּ אוֹיְבַ֣י לִ֑י וְשֹׁמְרֵ֥י נַ֝פְשִׁ֗י נוֹעֲצ֥וּ יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.king_james: For mine enemies speak against me; and they that lay wait for my soul take counsel together,

verses.latin_vulgate: dicentes : Deus dereliquit eum :  persequimini et comprehendite eum,  quia non est qui eripiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵ֭אמֹר אֱלֹהִ֣ים עֲזָב֑וֹ רִֽדְפ֥וּ וְ֝תִפְשׂ֗וּהוּ כִּי־אֵ֥ין מַצִּֽיל׃
verses.king_james: Saying, God hath forsaken him: persecute and take him; for there is none to deliver him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, ne elongeris a me ;  Deus meus, in auxilium meum respice.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱ֭לֹהִים אַל־תִּרְחַ֣ק מִמֶּ֑נִּי אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י לְעֶזְרָ֥תִי (חישה) [חֽוּשָׁה]׃
verses.king_james: O God, be not far from me: O my God, make haste for my help.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confundantur et deficiant detrahentes animæ meæ ;  operiantur confusione et pudore qui quærunt mala mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵבֹ֣שׁוּ יִכְלוּ֮ שֹׂטְנֵ֢י נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י יַעֲט֣וּ חֶ֭רְפָּה וּכְלִמָּ֑ה מְ֝בַקְשֵׁ֗י רָעָתִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Let them be confounded and consumed that are adversaries to my soul; let them be covered with reproach and dishonour that seek my hurt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem semper sperabo,  et adjiciam super omnem laudem tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭אֲנִי תָּמִ֣יד אֲיַחֵ֑ל וְ֝הוֹסַפְתִּ֗י עַל־כׇּל־תְּהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: But I will hope continually, and will yet praise thee more and more.

verses.latin_vulgate: Os meum annuntiabit justitiam tuam,  tota die salutare tuum.  Quoniam non cognovi litteraturam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּ֤י ׀ יְסַפֵּ֬ר צִדְקָתֶ֗ךָ כׇּל־הַיּ֥וֹם תְּשׁוּעָתֶ֑ךָ כִּ֤י לֹ֖א יָדַ֣עְתִּי סְפֹרֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: My mouth shall shew forth thy righteousness and thy salvation all the day; for I know not the numbers thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: introibo in potentias Domini ;  Domine, memorabor justitiæ tuæ solius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָב֗וֹא בִּ֭גְבֻרוֹת אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה אַזְכִּ֖יר צִדְקָתְךָ֣ לְבַדֶּֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: I will go in the strength of the Lord God: I will make mention of thy righteousness, even of thine only.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, docuisti me a juventute mea ;  et usque nunc pronuntiabo mirabilia tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱֽלֹהִ֗ים לִמַּדְתַּ֥נִי מִנְּעוּרָ֑י וְעַד־הֵ֝֗נָּה אַגִּ֥יד נִפְלְאוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: O God, thou hast taught me from my youth: and hitherto have I declared thy wondrous works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et usque in senectam et senium,  Deus, ne derelinquas me,  donec annuntiem brachium tuum generationi omni quæ ventura est,  potentiam tuam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֤ם עַד־זִקְנָ֨ה ׀ וְשֵׂיבָה֮ אֱלֹהִ֢ים אַֽל־תַּ֫עַזְבֵ֥נִי עַד־אַגִּ֣יד זְרוֹעֲךָ֣ לְד֑וֹר לְכׇל־יָ֝ב֗וֹא גְּבוּרָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Now also when I am old and grayheaded, O God, forsake me not; until I have shewed thy strength unto this generation, and thy power to every one that is to come.

verses.latin_vulgate: et justitiam tuam, Deus, usque in altissima ;  quæ fecisti magnalia, Deus : quis similis tibi ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצִדְקָתְךָ֥ אֱלֹהִ֗ים עַד־מָ֫ר֥וֹם אֲשֶׁר־עָשִׂ֥יתָ גְדֹל֑וֹת אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים מִ֣י כָמֽוֹךָ׃
verses.king_james: Thy righteousness also, O God, is very high, who hast done great things: O God, who is like unto thee!

verses.latin_vulgate: Quantas ostendisti mihi tribulationes multas et malas !  et conversus vivificasti me,  et de abyssis terræ iterum reduxisti me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֤ר (הראיתנו) [הִרְאִיתַ֨נִי ׀] צָר֥וֹת רַבּ֗וֹת וְרָ֫ע֥וֹת תָּשׁ֥וּב (תחינו) [תְּחַיֵּ֑נִי] וּֽמִתְּהֹמ֥וֹת הָ֝אָ֗רֶץ תָּשׁ֥וּב תַּעֲלֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Thou, which hast shewed me great and sore troubles, shalt quicken me again, and shalt bring me up again from the depths of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multiplicasti magnificentiam tuam ;  et conversus consolatus es me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֶּ֤רֶב ׀ גְּֽדֻלָּתִ֗י וְתִסֹּ֥ב תְּֽנַחֲמֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt increase my greatness, and comfort me on every side.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam et ego confitebor tibi in vasis psalmi veritatem tuam, Deus ;  psallam tibi in cithara, sanctus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־אֲנִ֤י ׀ אוֹדְךָ֣ בִכְלִי־נֶבֶל֮ אֲמִתְּךָ֢ אֱלֹ֫הָ֥י אֲזַמְּרָ֣ה לְךָ֣ בְכִנּ֑וֹר קְ֝ד֗וֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: I will also praise thee with the psaltery, even thy truth, O my God: unto thee will I sing with the harp, O thou Holy One of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsultabunt labia mea cum cantavero tibi ;  et anima mea quam redemisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּרַנֵּ֣נָּה שְׂ֭פָתַי כִּ֣י אֲזַמְּרָה־לָּ֑ךְ וְ֝נַפְשִׁ֗י אֲשֶׁ֣ר פָּדִֽיתָ׃
verses.king_james: My lips shall greatly rejoice when I sing unto thee; and my soul, which thou hast redeemed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et lingua mea tota die meditabitur justitiam tuam,  cum confusi et reveriti fuerint qui quærunt mala mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־לְשׁוֹנִ֗י כׇּל־הַ֭יּוֹם תֶּהְגֶּ֣ה צִדְקָתֶ֑ךָ כִּי־בֹ֥שׁוּ כִי־חָ֝פְר֗וּ מְבַקְשֵׁ֥י רָעָתִֽי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: My tongue also shall talk of thy righteousness all the day long: for they are confounded, for they are brought unto shame, that seek my hurt.
